description.content:
This collection is designed to test and demonstrate core API workflows using the ReqRes service. It includes requests for authentication, retrieving user data, creating users, updating user details, and deleting users.

The collection is organized by request type, with separate folders for GET, POST, PUT/PATCH, DELETE, authentication, and negative testing. It covers both standard CRUD operations and basic validation of error handling, making it useful for learning API testing, practicing request organization, and validating common user-related endpoints.
